product: Genie CSV downloads and caching enhancements
tagline: Fixed NULL value handling in downloaded CSVs: Genie no longer replaces NULL values with the string undefined when downloading CSV files.
what_it_does: Fixed NULL value handling in downloaded CSVs: Genie no longer replaces NULL values with the string undefined when downloading CSV files. Improved caching of Genie Space context: Caching enhancements speed up question performance when starting a new Genie session. Fixed incorrect access to Genie file upload feature: The file upload feature is now restricted to customers who have opted into the Public Preview as intended.
why_it_matters: Improved caching of Genie Space context: Caching enhancements speed up question performance when starting a new Genie session.
plain_summary: Fixed NULL value handling in downloaded CSVs: Genie no longer replaces NULL values with the string undefined when downloading CSV files. Improved caching of Genie Space context: Caching enhancements speed up question performance when starting a new Genie…
key_takeaway: Fixed NULL value handling in downloaded CSVs: Genie no longer replaces NULL values with the string undefined when downloading CSV files.
